frameworks.name: statistical physics neuron particle model
frameworks.one_line: particle-based model capturing causal information flow in spike trains

frameworks.name: fractional-order dynamics
frameworks.one_line: fractional operators governing spiking dynamics encode memory and scale

core_question: How can neuronal spike trains decode underlying network topology and predict behavior despite scarce and partial observation?
key_assumptions: spike trains carry causal fractal memory tied to network topology
fractional-order operators capture spiking memory and scale
single-unit spiking suffices to infer network-level structure
manipulations: analysis applied to real-world neuronal spiking recordings
key_findings: fractional-order operators recover memory and scale of spike trains
model exposes topological properties of the underlying neuronal network
model yields superior predictions of animal behavior across cognitive tasks
interpretations: neuron particle model links spike-train causal memory to network topology
fractional-order dynamics provide a unifying decoder of behavior from scarce spikes
